title: Rustins Stain Blocker & Multi-Surface Primer 500ml
features: Effective stain-blocking formula for a clean finish; Rustins Stain Blocker prevents stains from bleeding through paint, providing a flawless and uniform surface on walls and ceilings
Multi-purpose primer for a wide range of surfaces; ideal for sealing porous materials such as wood, plaster, and concrete; creates a strong bond for paint and enhances durability
Quick-drying and easy to apply for convenience; reduces project time while delivering professional results; suitable for use on indoor and outdoor surfaces; ADD TO BASKET now
Enhances paint adhesion and coverage; this primer improves the performance of topcoats, ensuring even application and long-lasting results with fewer coats of paint required
Trusted by professionals and DIY users alike; Rustins’ innovative solutions deliver reliable results; this stain blocker is a good choice for renovation and restoration projects
